title: the Post Office Time Deposit (Amendment) Rules, 1985.
description: the Post Office Time Deposit (Amendment) Rules, 1985.
text: REGISTERED No. D. (D.N.)-72 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 210] NEW DELHI, FRIDAY, MAY 10, 1985/VAISAKHA 20, 1907 Separate Paging is given to this Part in order that it may be filed as a separate compilation 182 GI/85 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART I I - S E C 3(i)l MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Economic Affairs) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 10th May, 1985 G.S.R. 418 (E): In exercise of the powers conferred by section 15 of the Government Savings Banks Act, 1873 (5 of 1873), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Post Office Time Deposit Rules, 1981, namely :— 1. Short title and commencement—(i) These rules may be called the Post Office Time Deposit (Amendment) Rules, 1985. (ii) They shall come into force on the date of their publi- cation in the official Gazette. 2. In the Post Office Time Deposit Rules, 1981, in rule 7, for Table F and the Note thereunder, the following Tables and Note shall be substituted, namely:— "TABLE F (For deposits made on or after the 1st March 1983 but before the 10th May, 1985) Period of deposit 1 Year 2 Years 3 Years 5 Years Rate of interest per annum 9 Per cent 9-3/4 Per cent 10-1/2 Per cent 11-1/2 Per cent TABLE G (For deposits made on or after the 10th May, 1985) Period of deposit 1 Year 2 Years 3 Years 5 Years Rate of interest per annum 9-1/2 Percent 10 Per cent 10-1/2 Per cent 11-1/2 Per cent Note:—For deposits made on or after 1st October, 1979, in- terest will be payable at the rates specified in.Table C or Table D or Table E or Table F or Table G, as the case may be, calculated at half-yearly rest." [No.F.2/10/85-NS] A. RANGACHARI, Jt. Secy. The principal rules were published vide GSR No. 664(E) dated 17-12-1981. Subsequent amendments were issued vide GSR No. 300 (E) dated 1-4-82 and GSR No. 257 (E) dated 11-3-83. PRINTED BY THE MANAGER, GOVT. OF INDIA PRESS, RING ROAD, NEW DELHI-110064 AND PUBLISHED BY THE CONTROLLER OF PUBLICATIONS, DELHI-110054, 1 9 8 5 -- 2 of 2 --
